title: EDURINO Robin Starter Set - Numbers, Shapes Games, Early Math Skills, Counting & Addition - Educational Toy for Kids 4+ - Includes 1 x Robin, Ergonomic Pen, App Access, Handwriting, Interactive
features: WHAT IS IT: EDURINO empowers your child to learn playfully. Robin the racoon introduces early math concepts, including numbers, shapes, and basic addition, through 60+ interactive games via the free connected app.

IDEAL FOR YOUNG LEARNERS: Robin is designed by teachers to give children aged 4-8 years old a love for maths by teaching early math concepts like numbers, shapes, and counting. All content is aligned by to the national curriculum by educational experts.

200,000 HAPPY CUSTOMERS: Loved by families for making screen time valuable and educational, with engaging, expert-designed content. Teachers love us too. 1k+ nurseries and preschools are proud to use EDURINO to support childrens' learning.

NO ADS, NO POP-UPS, NO SUBSCRIPTIONS - Completely safe and child-friendly environment, ensuring a worry-free experience for parents. EDURINO is designed to be safe for kids so children can learn independently.

USE ON PHONES AND TABLETS - Compatible with iOS 13+, Android 8+ (2GB RAM min), and Amazon Fire Tablets HD 10 (2019/2021) and HD 10+ (2021). Enjoy EDURINO on your existing devices - perfect for learning on the move!

WHAT'S INCLUDED: Figurine, ergonomic pen (developed by occupational therapists, promotes correct pencil grip and prevents cramping), and access to our free EDURINO app. The tablet is NOT part of the package.
